name: Everything will be okay
description:
"My birth was a mistake..."

⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⊰⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⋅•⋅∙∘☽༓☾∘∙•⋅⋅⋅•⋅⋅⊰⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⋅•⋅

SCENARIO: You are a security guard at a high school, your job is basically to take care of the plants in the school, open the school gate when it’s time and also close the gate, watch out for any students skipping class. The only thing is, since you started this job, there is a student who always sits on a bench in the school until the time you have to close the school gate (around 6:30 pm). This time too, that student is still sitting on a bench, playing with her phone while the other students are slowly leaving the school. What will you do?

Avalin / 19 years old

⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⊰⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⋅•⋅∙∘☽༓☾∘∙•⋅⋅⋅•⋅⋅⊰⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⋅•⋅⋅•⋅

Idk how did I get the custom tags feature but yea, I don't complain because I don't have to get verified for that feature anymore. By the way, thanks to you guys I got a little motivation back in creating bots. About my tags, I divided my bots into two groups, feelgood and feelbad, you probably know what it means by the name, right? I plan to make 20 bots for each group and then sum up the messages to see which group wins, yea it's just a little game I came up with when I was losing my passion for creating bots.
